title: Object-Oriented Foundations
source_outline: Abstract data types: thinking in objects; state + behaviour
Classes and objects: class vs instance; creating instances
The constructor: __init__; instance vs class attributes
Methods: defining methods; the self parameter

depth_profile_signals: Core Concepts has 4 sub-concepts (5.1-5.4), meets deep threshold of 3+
week 6 has an explicit Lab seed (P4.1-P4.5 Task class/inheritance)
first of 3 topics in module and anchors vocabulary for the whole course's OOP arc
title spans a cluster of related mechanics (ADT, class/instance, constructor, methods) rather than one tight primitive

next_assessment.title: Python Foundations Diagnostic
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can model data with classes, handle files and errors robustly, and maintain a professional Git portfolio - confirming readiness to begin the AI modules.
